LanguageData.MechanoidTransponder.description: A pre-War transponder by RobCo Industries.
LanguageData.MechanoidTransponder.label: RobCo Transponder
LanguageData.NanostructuringChip.description: The depleted remains of a Sentry Bot fusion cell.
LanguageData.NanostructuringChip.label: depleted Sentry Bot Fusion Core
LanguageData.PowerfocusChip.description: The severed head of a broken Assaultron.
LanguageData.PowerfocusChip.label: scrap Assaultron head
LanguageData.SignalChip.description: Still functional parts of a Mister Handy unit thruster.
LanguageData.SignalChip.label: salvaged Handy thrusters
LanguageData.SubcoreBasic.label: basic Circuitry
LanguageData.SubcoreRegular.label: military-grade Circuitry
LanguageData.UnfinishedSubcore.label: unfinished RobCo Parts
LanguageData.MechGestator.description: A compact RobCo pod designed for civilian automation and light fabrication.
LanguageData.MechGestator.label: civilian RobCo pod
LanguageData.LargeMechGestator.description: A heavy RobCo pod built for military robotics and high-throughput fabrication.
LanguageData.LargeMechGestator.label: military RobCo pod
LanguageData.BasicRecharger.description: A compact RobCo recharger for basic mech maintenance and power recovery.
LanguageData.BasicRecharger.label: civilian recharger
LanguageData.StandardRecharger.description: A robust RobCo recharger for sustained mech upkeep and field deployment.
LanguageData.StandardRecharger.label: military recharger
LanguageData.SubcoreEncoder.description: A RobCo terminal used to encode and prepare subroutine cores for machine use.
LanguageData.SubcoreEncoder.label: RobCo subroutine terminal
LanguageData.SubcoreSoftscanner.description: A RobCo scanner used to inspect and evaluate subroutine patterns.
LanguageData.SubcoreSoftscanner.label: RobCo subroutine scanner
LanguageData.SubcoreRipscanner.description: A RobCo processing station for ripscanning and extracting machine intelligence modules.
LanguageData.SubcoreRipscanner.label: RobCo robobrain processing
